name: Christmas Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mixed dark and light raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together the whole wheat flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
4. Add the fruit, nuts, orange rind, carrots, and spices; mix well.
5. Dissolve the sweetener into the beaten eggs and beat it into the dry ingredients to form a soft dough.
6. Pour in enough orange juice to make the dough pliable.
7. Place the mixture in an 8-inch round or 7x7-inch nonstick cake pan, spread evenly.
8. Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until firm to the touch and a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Use a larger pan if necessary and adjust baking time accordingly.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan.
10. Turn the cake upside down onto a serving plate, making a few holes with a toothpick for ventilation.
11. If desired, add any remaining orange juice and alcohol.
12. Store in an airtight container. Optionally, frost with a mixture of apples and cottage cheese.
Serving Information:
- 12 slices
- Each slice contains approximately: 180 calories, 20 grams (2 units) carbohydrates (2 bread/starch exchanges), 4 grams fiber, 5 grams protein, 9 grams fat
